title: Genesis Mod
description:
Minecraft mod that adds a ton of goodies.
Including (but not limited to) Bronze, Steel, Cans and Makahuitls!
body:
This is a mod made for the 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**JPsmp4** server.

</details>

 But anyone can use it

Mainly this mod focuses on quality of life features like Steel, Bronze, Tin and Tin cans (to stack soup) As well as a few decorative blocks like slate, littered dirt and obsidian shards (used for obsidian shields and makahuitls ["aztec" swords]) which are not survival friendly due to them not spawning naturally, but they can still be used for mapmaking, also this mod adds alcholic brews like Beer, Wine and Vodka as well as a new custom tier: Voiderite, also meant for mapmaking.
